title: Potato Ricer, Sopito Stainless Steel Potato Masher Heavy Duty Food Ricer with Silicone Handle for Fruit Vegetable, Black
features: Superior Quality: Sopito potato ricer boasts a durable stainless steel construction and the silicone handle ensures a comfortable grip and prevents slipping, providing you with a long-lasting tool.
Large Capacity: Sopito potato ricer features an 15oz container that can accommodate more potatoes. It can create perfectly smooth, restaurant-quality mashed potatoes quickly than others.
Ergonomic Extended Handles: The extended handles (measures 11.8inches/30cm) and ergonomic design (compliant with leverage theory ) make squeezing a breeze, and comfortable to hold with your hands.
Easy to Clean: Made of dishwasher-safe stainless steel, this potato ricer is a breeze to clean. The connector pin on the right can be pulled out to diassemble the rice for more thorough cleaning.
Versatile and Multi-Functional: Our potato ricer masher is not limited to potatoes alone. Use it as a vegetable press or to prepare fresh fruit juice, also perfect for making healthy baby food.
description: Product Description Large Potato Ricer Stainless Steel for NO LUMP POTATO MASH Effortless, Smooth Mashing Every Time Large Capacity Our Large Capacity Masher handles full potatoes or multiple pieces at once. It efficiently creates smooth, no lump mashes in seconds. A must-have for family gatherings! The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
